2603.22323.title: A Multi-Task Targeted Learning Framework for Lithium-Ion Battery State-of-Health and Remaining Useful Life
2603.22323.paper_summary: Accurately predicting the state-of-health (SOH) and remaining useful life (RUL) of lithium-ion batteries is crucial for ensuring the safe and efficient operation of electric vehicles while minimizing associated risks. However, current deep learning methods are limited in their ability to selectively extract features and model time dependencies for these two parameters. Moreover, most existing methods rely on traditional recurrent neural networks, which have inherent shortcomings in long-term time-series modeling. To address these issues, this paper proposes a multi-task targeted learning framework for SOH and RUL prediction, which integrates multiple neural networks, including a multi-scale feature extraction module, an improved extended LSTM, and a dual-stream attention module. First, a feature extraction module with multi-scale CNNs is designed to capture detailed local battery decline patterns. Secondly, an improved extended LSTM network is employed to enhance the model's ability to retain long-term temporal information, thus improving temporal relationship modeling. Building on this, the dual-stream attention module-comprising polarized attention and sparse attention to selectively focus on key information relevant to SOH and RUL, respectively, by assigning higher weights to important features. Finally, a many-to-two mapping is achieved through the dual-task layer. To optimize the model's performance and reduce the need for manual hyperparameter tuning, the Hyperopt optimization algorithm is used. Extensive comparative experiments on battery aging datasets demonstrate that the proposed method reduces the average RMSE for SOH and RUL predictions by 111.3\% and 33.0\%, respectively, compared to traditional and state-of-the-art methods.
2603.22323.paper_summary_zh: 準確預測鋰離子電池的健康狀態（SOH）和剩餘使用壽命（RUL）對於確保電動車的安全與高效運行，同時最小化相關風險至關重要。<lb/>然而，目前的深度學習方法在選擇性提取特徵和建模這兩個參數的時間依賴性方面存在限制。<lb/>此外，大多數現有方法依賴於傳統的循環神經網絡，這在長期時間序列建模中具有固有的缺陷。<lb/>為了解決這些問題，本文提出了一個多任務針對性學習框架，用於SOH和RUL預測，該框架整合了多個神經網絡，包括多尺度特徵提取模塊、改進的擴展LSTM和雙流注意力模塊。<lb/>首先，設計了一個具有多尺度CNN的特徵提取模塊，以捕捉詳細的局部電池衰退模式。<lb/>其次，採用了改進的擴展LSTM網絡，以增強模型保留長期時間信息的能力，從而改善時間關係建模。<lb/>在此基礎上，雙流注意力模塊由極化注意力和稀疏注意力組成，分別選擇性地聚焦於與SOH和RUL相關的關鍵信息，通過為重要特徵分配更高的權重來實現。<lb/>最後，通過雙任務層實現多對二的映射。<lb/>為了優化模型的性能並減少對手動超參數調整的需求，使用了Hyperopt優化算法。<lb/>在電池老化數據集上進行的廣泛比較實驗表明，與傳統方法和最先進的方法相比，所提出的方法分別將SOH和RUL預測的平均RMSE降低了111.3\%和33.0\%。
2603.22323.author: Chenhan Wang et.al.
2603.22323.authors: Chenhan Wang, Zhengyi Bao, Huipin Lin, Jiahao Nie, Chunxiang Zhu
